description: Sample domain registry for DIL operational path resolution. Copy to _shared/_meta/domain_registry.json in your vault and customize.

prune_strategy_definitions.trailing_window: Find the most recent log file in the domain log tree. Delete files older than window_days before that file.

archive_strategy_definitions.active_archived: Non-terminal tasks in active/. Terminal tasks (done/cancelled/retired) older than after_days move to archived/{year}/ based on year_key.

path_resolution.description: relative paths resolve against $BASE_DIL. absolute paths used as-is. mixed means task_dir is relative but log_dir/data_dir may be absolute.
